title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system that enables legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. The platform leverages Anthropic's Claude to interpret law and automate legal processes that have traditionally required manual labor.
